# Javier Pardo Fernandez

> Software engineer based in Oslo, Norway. Curious about how things work—from code to hardware. Enjoys building apps, scalable systems, high-performance computing, functional programming, and algorithms; connects ideas across software, hardware, and IoT. Outside of work: outdoors, sports, football, friends, food, travel, music. Open to consulting and freelance (system architecture, cloud, second opinions on code).

## About

**Tagline:** Software Engineer. Building Solutions That Work.

Hey, I'm Javier — a Software Engineer based in Oslo, Norway, who loves figuring out how everything works. For a living, that curiosity takes me from the software we write to the hardware we use every day.

I like building just about anything, with a special interest in apps, engineering scalable systems, tinkering with high-performance computing, functional programming, and designing algorithms. I enjoy connecting ideas across software, hardware, and IoT.

I'm also available for consulting and freelance projects—whether you need help architecting a new system, optimizing cloud infrastructure, or a second pair of eyes on your code.

## What I offer

- **Cloud & infrastructure** — Extensive experience with AWS and cloud infrastructure, improving system performance and cost-effectiveness through optimized solutions.
- **Full-stack development** — Advanced proficiency in Python, JavaScript, React, and various frameworks; robust, scalable web applications.
- **Testing & optimization** — Software testing, bug fixing, and performance optimization with a track record of meaningful efficiency gains.
- **Project management** — Complex projects, best practices, and continuous improvement in development processes.
- **Team collaboration** — Cross-team collaboration, code review, mentoring, knowledge sharing.
- **Innovation** — Applying current technologies and methods to hard problems and business outcomes.

## Experience

### Roadguard — Software Engineer — March 2025 – Present

Focus: computer vision, edge AI, backend, DevOps, IoT, networks, video streaming, authentication.

- Lead UI developer for Roadguard's roadside tire safety system: operator dashboard and data visualization for real-time camera and sensor streams to detect worn or unsafe tires.
- Authentication and authorization with Keycloak and BFF patterns; securing access to 10TB+ of sensitive tire data and operational controls.
- Video streaming with Go2RTC and Caddy for live camera feeds; ANPR integration (1M+ plate records daily) tied to tire events and vehicle profiles.
- Image processing pipelines (vehicle separation, tread depth, curation) as containerized services on Docker/Kubernetes (500K+ images/day, 99.9% reliability target).
- CI/CD and monitoring: GitHub Actions, Azure Container Registry, custom dashboards; 99.9% uptime target for critical infrastructure (10K+ daily API requests).
- Cross-functional work integrating machine vision with backend decisioning; nationwide rollout with Statens Vegvesen targeting fewer accidents (~15%) and less microplastic tire pollution (~30%).

### Bio-Me — Software Engineer — October 2023 – March 2025

- Led architecture of the microbiome profiling platform: +20% pipeline throughput, −35% storage costs.
- Evolved LIMS for 5 regulatory workflows and 18+ clinical customers.
- Mentored internships: 4 students, 16 production features.
- Documentation and engineering practices: +12% release efficiency, −30% onboarding time.
- Nine cross-functional roadmap initiatives delivered on schedule.

### Bio-Me — Junior Software Engineer — October 2021 – October 2023

- Microbiome platform: distributed pipelines +200% processing efficiency, −31% storage costs.
- Computational workflows for species-specific genomic regions and qPCR; scalable LIMS features for clinical and commercial needs.
- Automated testing and validation: +18% reliability.

### Caltrans — Transportation Engineer Technician — September 2020 – March 2021

- Data analysis systems for infrastructure monitoring; automated compliance and QA across construction sites.
- Technical documentation and analytics for construction oversight; −25% documentation processing time.
- Data pipelines for materials, safety, and environmental metrics; digital contract and quality-control solutions.

### California State University Chico — Electrical/Computer Engineering Tutor — August 2018 – December 2019

- Instruction in computer architecture, data structures, algorithms; +17% student performance metrics.
- Workshops: embedded systems, DSP, computational methods; problem-solving in C++, Python, hardware.

### AI Talentum — Software Engineer Internship — June 2016 – August 2016

- Scalable Twitter data collection and analytics for ML; ETL, validation, and storage.

## Education

- **Universitat de Barcelona** — MSc, Project Management — March 2023 – March 2024
- **UC Berkeley** — Bootcamp, Data Science — November 2020 – June 2021
- **California State University, Chico** — BSc, Computer Engineering — August 2015 – December 2019

## Maintenance

Structured résumé data on the site is served from the API; the canonical JSON is under `backend/data/work_experience.json` and `backend/data/records.json`. If you change roles or education, update those files **and** this document so they stay aligned.
